metadata.title: mymun Conference Date Extract (Cleaned)
metadata.effectiveFilters: Europe + Asia (`a=eu,as`), in-person only, future conferences, sort by price descending (`s=fe&r=desc`).
metadata.exportMethod: full filtered conference list API pull for review: `https://mymun.com/api/conferences?filter_time=future&sb=fe&order=desc&filter_cont=eu&filter_cont=as&online_conf=false&page=1&per_page=500`
metadata.note: the calendar view loads month-by-month and its calendar data request drops the sort params. This export uses the matching list endpoint so all filtered conference date ranges are captured in one file.
cleaningRules: Removed entries marked as cancelled/canceled in the title.
Removed conferences with inclusive duration longer than 4 days.
Removed malformed records whose end date is earlier than the start date.
